name: Lyra
lore: She is a bow user who can also do some hand-to-hand combat when needed. Her true power lies in her usage of Red Ice—a unique, volatile mix of ice and lava that freezes enemies on contact and burns fiercely if broken.

skills.description: Does damage equal to ATK-scaled to one enemy; applies [decay.stacks] Decay for [decay.duration] turns.
Does Pierce damage equal to ATK-scaled to one enemy.

ultimate.description: Does Pierce damage equal to ATK-scaled to all enemies.

passive.name: First Action: Unbreakable Ice
passive.description: When Lyra acts first in a turn, gains +150% DEF for 1 turn. This buff is unstackable and uncancellable.
